description: An executive has elected to defer a portion of their bonus into a non-qualified deferred compensation plan.

nodes.task_description: Receive the executive's deferral election form.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the form specifying the deferral amount.

nodes.task_description: When processing the executive's bonus, reduce the cash payment by the deferred amount.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly calculates the net bonus payment.

nodes.task_description: Create a journal entry to record the deferred amount, debiting 'Bonus Expense' and crediting 'Deferred Compensation Liability'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent posts the correct entry to record the long-term liability.
